sidebar.title:
Business Intent
Translator
sidebar.tagline: Turns early business ideas into validated, owner-backed, testable requirements and alignment artifacts — stories, acceptance criteria, and rapid prototypes.

principle.label: ⚡ Key Principle — Requirement Quality
principle.text: No requirement closes without human sign-off. Every business spec is explicit, comprehensive, and traceable to acceptance criteria.

card.title: Requirements Capture Interface
card.note: Product owners and business analysts capture and refine requirements through guided dialogue

components.name: Meeting Synthesis
components.note: Automatically synthesize meeting memos and extract business specs

components.name: Expert Sparring
components.note: Spar with domain experts to ensure specs are explicit and comprehensive

components.name: Requirement Drafting
components.note: Draft and document business requirements as concept/feature specifications

components.name: Business-to-Tech Translation
components.note: Translate business requirements to high-level technical requirements

components.name: Human Sign-off & Artifact Generation
components.note: Route specs for human validation, then generate artifacts via out-of-box tooling

cards.name: Requirements Library
cards.desc: Business demands · feature specs · acceptance criteria · change history

cards.name: Business Specs Templates
cards.desc: Standard templates · requirement patterns · specification frameworks

cards.name: Corporate Guidelines
cards.desc: Requirements standards · communication rules · maintenance procedures

rag.label: RAG / Retrieval Pipeline
rag.body: Vector store · semantic search over requirements library, business specs, and guideline documentation

cards.name: MS Teams
cards.detail: Meeting transcripts · chat history · collaboration channels

cards.name: Document Repositories
cards.detail: Business specs · requirement docs · feature specifications

cards.name: Artifact Generation
cards.detail: Rapid prototyping · story mapping · out-of-box tooling
